div.h2: H0..H7 Initial Values: Square Roots of First 8 Primes

g.text: Total: 32 bytes (256 bits) — full compression function input width
Role of H0..H7 in the Algorithm
H0..H7 vs K[0..63]: Same Principle, Different Sources
H[0..7] | sqrt of primes | 8 values | initial compression state
K[0..63] | cbrt of primes | 64 values | round constants per block
Both | publicly derivable | verifiable | no trapdoor possible
Step 2: frac() — keep only fractional part
Step 3: multiply by 2^32, truncate to uint32
Input to compression, NOT output directly
MUST reset per hash — reuse is a security bug
